title: Release 2.4.0 Draft
summary: This release tightens core protocol reliability and improves release-tooling determinism, with limited low-volume packaging impact.

sections.overview: Core remains the highest-signal area in this range, focused on safer protocol and fuse behavior.
bullets: WebSocket handshake validation now rejects invalid client nonce flows earlier.
Fuse mount cleanup logic now checks active mount state before teardown.

sections.overview: Release tooling changes improve deterministic changelog generation quality.
bullets: Payload shaping now includes explicit truncation metadata and stable evidence ordering.
CLI changelog workflow tests were expanded to cover output paths and stage wiring.

notes: Packaging updates in this range are low-volume and should not be overstated.
